description_long: This object is a traditional Japanese katana sword accompanied by its matching black lacquered sheath. The blade is long, gently curved, and single-edged, with a sharp point and a polished metallic finish. The handle is wrapped in a textured black material, likely ray skin and cord, providing a secure grip, and is capped with a decorative pommel. A circular hand guard (tsuba) separates the blade from the handle, featuring subtle metallic detailing. The sheath is black with gold or brass accents and a cord attachment, designed to securely house the blade when not in use. The overall craftsmanship suggests a blend of functionality and aesthetic appeal, typical of classic katana swords.
description: A traditional Japanese katana sword with a curved, polished blade, black wrapped handle, and matching black sheath with gold accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the katana blade and sheath, highlighting the curve and decorative details.
description_view_1: Top-down view focusing on the handle's wrapping and the alignment of the blade and sheath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade and sheath, with the hand guard and handle details visible.
description_view_3: End-on view emphasizing the thickness of the handle and the circular guard.
attribute_handle_design: straight, black cord-wrapped handle with textured grip and decorative pommel
attribute_ornamentation: gold accents and subtle decorative detailing on the sheath and guard
